element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic strength-based control scheme, likely tutorial event
Directional precision required; noted as best event by reviewers but mechanically complex
Balance mechanics; criticized for high difficulty in reviews
Balance and timing under pressure; high difficulty implied

typical_tension_triggers: Difficulty spikes in slalom skiing and log rolling
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Sequential event-based structure allowing player-controlled progression; variety in event mechanics maintains engagement and prevents monotony

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Event selection provides non-linear progression; players can choose individual events, multiple events, or sequential competition

difficulty_curve.early_game: Weightlifting appears as accessible entry point with basic controls
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progression through moderate difficulty events like slalom skiing and log rolling with increasing mechanical complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Bull riding and other advanced events featuring complex joystick patterns with minimal mechanical connection to real-world sport
notable_spikes: Slalom skiing difficulty spike noted in multiple reviews
Log rolling difficulty criticized as unexpectedly challenging
Bull riding mechanical complexity relative to intuitive sport understanding

notable_level_patterns.description: Each event functions as self-contained mini-game with unique control scheme and win condition; players learn through repetition and joystick pattern memorization rather than spatial navigation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Slalom skiing features track navigation with abstract joystick controls

notable_level_patterns.description: Non-narrative progression through world sports events; presentation and mechanics bear 'bizarre little joystick patterns which have little to do with the events' themselves
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Weightlifting and sumo wrestling use abstract input schemes

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple progression paths: sequential competition, custom event selection, single event focus, or practice mode allow player to control difficulty curve and pacing
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Main menu meta-structure enabling event cherry-picking
